name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-12
title: Re-home rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md content invariants from tdd-subagent to rabbit-feature
description:
After Cycle B of the rabbit-feature re-home (PR #142), four invariants in tdd-subagent spec (current numbering Inv 15, 17, 18, 26) still constrain SKILL.md content for the rabbit-feature-touch skill, which is now owned by rabbit-feature. This is a bounded-scope drift per philosophy.md §2: tdd-subagent should not constrain content of a file it does not own. The user explicitly scoped the Cycle B re-partition to Inv 6/13/14/15 only, deferring these four.

Action: move Inv 15 (Step 4 marker doc in SKILL.md), Inv 17 (Red Flags main-session-write rule), Inv 18 (Red Flags scope-marker rule), Inv 26 (B/B mode item.json read rule) from tdd-subagent spec to rabbit-feature spec; renumber survivors gap-free in both features; update any tests that reference these invariants by their tdd-subagent number to point at the new rabbit-feature numbers.
